Q_OBJECT_COUNTS.sql: WITH active_epoch AS (SELECT visibility_epoch_id FROM public.twin_fact_visibility_epoch_v1 WHERE status='ACTIVE'), visible_facts AS (SELECT f.fact_id,f.record_json FROM public.facts f JOIN public.twin_fact_visibility_index_v1 v ON v.fact_id=f.fact_id JOIN active_epoch e ON e.visibility_epoch_id=v.visibility_epoch_id), o AS (SELECT fact_id, record_json->>'type' AS object_type, record_json->'payload'->>'object_id' AS object_id, record_json->'payload'->>'lineage_id' AS lineage_id, record_json->'payload'->>'revision_id' AS revision_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id' AS formal_run_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'phase_id' AS phase_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'tick_id' AS tick_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'obligation_id' AS obligation_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload' AS payload FROM visible_facts WHERE record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1 AND record_json->'payload'->>'tenant_id'=$2 AND record_json->'payload'->>'project_id'=$3 AND record_json->'payload'->>'group_id'=$4 AND record_json->'payload'->>'field_id'=$5 AND record_json->'payload'->>'season_id'=$6 AND record_json->'payload'->>'zone_id'=$7) SELECT object_type,phase_id,count(*)::int AS object_count FROM o GROUP BY object_type,phase_id ORDER BY object_type,phase_id

Q_PHASE_OBJECT_COUNT.sql: WITH active_epoch AS (SELECT visibility_epoch_id FROM public.twin_fact_visibility_epoch_v1 WHERE status='ACTIVE'), visible_facts AS (SELECT f.fact_id,f.record_json FROM public.facts f JOIN public.twin_fact_visibility_index_v1 v ON v.fact_id=f.fact_id JOIN active_epoch e ON e.visibility_epoch_id=v.visibility_epoch_id), o AS (SELECT fact_id, record_json->>'type' AS object_type, record_json->'payload'->>'object_id' AS object_id, record_json->'payload'->>'lineage_id' AS lineage_id, record_json->'payload'->>'revision_id' AS revision_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id' AS formal_run_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'phase_id' AS phase_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'tick_id' AS tick_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'obligation_id' AS obligation_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload' AS payload FROM visible_facts WHERE record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1 AND record_json->'payload'->>'tenant_id'=$2 AND record_json->'payload'->>'project_id'=$3 AND record_json->'payload'->>'group_id'=$4 AND record_json->'payload'->>'field_id'=$5 AND record_json->'payload'->>'season_id'=$6 AND record_json->'payload'->>'zone_id'=$7) SELECT count(*)::int AS object_count FROM o WHERE object_type=$8 AND phase_id=$9

Q_OBLIGATION_COUNT.sql: WITH active_epoch AS (SELECT visibility_epoch_id FROM public.twin_fact_visibility_epoch_v1 WHERE status='ACTIVE'), visible_facts AS (SELECT f.fact_id,f.record_json FROM public.facts f JOIN public.twin_fact_visibility_index_v1 v ON v.fact_id=f.fact_id JOIN active_epoch e ON e.visibility_epoch_id=v.visibility_epoch_id), o AS (SELECT fact_id, record_json->>'type' AS object_type, record_json->'payload'->>'object_id' AS object_id, record_json->'payload'->>'lineage_id' AS lineage_id, record_json->'payload'->>'revision_id' AS revision_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id' AS formal_run_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'phase_id' AS phase_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'tick_id' AS tick_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'obligation_id' AS obligation_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload' AS payload FROM visible_facts WHERE record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1 AND record_json->'payload'->>'tenant_id'=$2 AND record_json->'payload'->>'project_id'=$3 AND record_json->'payload'->>'group_id'=$4 AND record_json->'payload'->>'field_id'=$5 AND record_json->'payload'->>'season_id'=$6 AND record_json->'payload'->>'zone_id'=$7) SELECT count(*)::int AS object_count FROM o WHERE object_type=$8 AND obligation_id=$9

Q_TOTAL_TYPE_COUNT.sql: WITH active_epoch AS (SELECT visibility_epoch_id FROM public.twin_fact_visibility_epoch_v1 WHERE status='ACTIVE'), visible_facts AS (SELECT f.fact_id,f.record_json FROM public.facts f JOIN public.twin_fact_visibility_index_v1 v ON v.fact_id=f.fact_id JOIN active_epoch e ON e.visibility_epoch_id=v.visibility_epoch_id), o AS (SELECT fact_id, record_json->>'type' AS object_type, record_json->'payload'->>'object_id' AS object_id, record_json->'payload'->>'lineage_id' AS lineage_id, record_json->'payload'->>'revision_id' AS revision_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id' AS formal_run_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'phase_id' AS phase_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'tick_id' AS tick_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'obligation_id' AS obligation_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload' AS payload FROM visible_facts WHERE record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1 AND record_json->'payload'->>'tenant_id'=$2 AND record_json->'payload'->>'project_id'=$3 AND record_json->'payload'->>'group_id'=$4 AND record_json->'payload'->>'field_id'=$5 AND record_json->'payload'->>'season_id'=$6 AND record_json->'payload'->>'zone_id'=$7) SELECT count(*)::int AS object_count FROM o WHERE object_type=$8

Q_POINTER_INTEGRITY.sql: WITH active_epoch AS (SELECT visibility_epoch_id FROM public.twin_fact_visibility_epoch_v1 WHERE status='ACTIVE'), visible_facts AS (SELECT f.fact_id,f.record_json FROM public.facts f JOIN public.twin_fact_visibility_index_v1 v ON v.fact_id=f.fact_id JOIN active_epoch e ON e.visibility_epoch_id=v.visibility_epoch_id) SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM public.twin_active_lineage_index_v1 a JOIN visible_facts f ON f.record_json->'payload'->>'object_id'=a.active_lineage_ref WHERE a.tenant_id=$2 AND a.project_id=$3 AND a.group_id=$4 AND a.field_id=$5 AND a.season_id=$6 AND a.zone_id=$7 AND f.record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1)::int AS active_lineage_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM public.twin_runtime_checkpoint_latest_index_v1 c JOIN visible_facts f ON f.fact_id=c.source_fact_id WHERE c.tenant_id=$2 AND c.project_id=$3 AND c.group_id=$4 AND c.field_id=$5 AND c.season_id=$6 AND c.zone_id=$7 AND f.record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1)::int AS checkpoint_count

Q_CONFLICTS.sql: WITH active_epoch AS (SELECT visibility_epoch_id FROM public.twin_fact_visibility_epoch_v1 WHERE status='ACTIVE'), visible_facts AS (SELECT f.fact_id,f.record_json FROM public.facts f JOIN public.twin_fact_visibility_index_v1 v ON v.fact_id=f.fact_id JOIN active_epoch e ON e.visibility_epoch_id=v.visibility_epoch_id), o AS (SELECT fact_id, record_json->>'type' AS object_type, record_json->'payload'->>'object_id' AS object_id, record_json->'payload'->>'lineage_id' AS lineage_id, record_json->'payload'->>'revision_id' AS revision_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id' AS formal_run_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'phase_id' AS phase_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'tick_id' AS tick_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'obligation_id' AS obligation_id, record_json->'payload'->'payload' AS payload FROM visible_facts WHERE record_json->'payload'->'payload'->>'formal_run_id'=$1 AND record_json->'payload'->>'tenant_id'=$2 AND record_json->'payload'->>'project_id'=$3 AND record_json->'payload'->>'group_id'=$4 AND record_json->'payload'->>'field_id'=$5 AND record_json->'payload'->>'season_id'=$6 AND record_json->'payload'->>'zone_id'=$7), duplicate_objects AS (SELECT object_id FROM o GROUP BY object_id HAVING count(*)<>1), mixed_lineage AS (SELECT count(DISTINCT lineage_id)::int n FROM o WHERE lineage_id IS NOT NULL), mixed_revision AS (SELECT count(DISTINCT revision_id)::int n FROM o WHERE revision_id IS NOT NULL), epoch_cardinality AS (SELECT count(*)::int n FROM active_epoch) SELECT ((SELECT n FROM epoch_cardinality)<>1 OR (SELECT count(*) FROM duplicate_objects)>0 OR (SELECT n FROM mixed_lineage)>1 OR (SELECT n FROM mixed_revision)>1)::boolean AS conflict
